faq.answer: Leaks in the system or improper charging during installation.
faq.question: What causes low refrigerant levels?

faq.answer: At least once a year or during regular maintenance.
faq.question: How often should I check refrigerant levels?

title: AC Blowing Warm Air

causes.name: Low refrigerant levels
causes.explanation: This issue occurs when the refrigerant charge is insufficient for the system to operate effectively. It can lead to overheating and compressor damage if not addressed promptly.

repairs.cost: Varies based on refrigerant type and labor
repairs.name: Recharge refrigerant

summary: Warm air from the AC can indicate several issues.
subtitle: Insufficient refrigerant can lead to inadequate cooling performance.

top_causes.name: Low refrigerant levels
top_causes.explanation: This issue occurs when the refrigerant charge is insufficient for the system to operate effectively. It can lead to overheating and compressor damage if not addressed promptly.

tools_required.reason: To supply the necessary refrigerant for recharging

diagnostic_steps: Check the air filter for clogs.
